top_signals.title: BOJ’s Tamura Calls for Raising Interest Rate Every Few Months
top_signals.summary: The Bank of Japan needs to raise interest rates every few months and should quicken the pace in the face of rising inflationary pressures, board member Naoki Tamura said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stocks Rally as Micron Revives AI Trade, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia climbed alongside US equity futures after Micron Technology Inc.’s blowout sales outlook reignited confidence in the artificial-intelligence trade, with a slide in oil prices further boosting sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Venezuela rocked by two big earthquakes
top_signals.summary: Local officials warn of fatalities as people left trapped under rubble
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gen. Christopher Donahue to unexpectedly relinquish command of Army Europe and Africa
top_signals.summary: U.S. Army Gen. Christopher Donahue will unexpectedly relinquish command next week after just 18 months in the role, the Pentagon confirmed Wednesday.

top_signals.title: Buildings collapse as quakes rock Venezuela, ‘high casualties’ likely
top_signals.summary: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake has hit about 160 km west of Caracas, followed less than a minute later by a ​magnitude 7.5 tremor, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
